title: Jbel Tamarrakoit
summary: Jbel Tamarrakoit is an extinct shield volcano located 60 km south of the city of Ifrane in the Middle Atlas of Morocco. This mountain is one of the three main volcanic structures of the Azrou region along with Jbel El Koudiate and Jbel Outgui.
